title: Lock Property
subtitle: Administrative control utility for locking or unlocking groups of properties within selected ranges.

resultsTable.title: Bulk Operations ({count} properties selected)
resultsTable.placeholderText: Please select a ward and property range, then click "Show" to view properties.

manageModal.title: Manage Locks: {propertyNo}
manageModal.description: Select which modules or screens should be locked for this property. Checked screens will prevent users from performing edits or submissions.

messages.screenRequired: Please select at least one screen from the Screen selection card to lock.
messages.lockConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to lock the selected screens for property {propertyNo}?
messages.unlockConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to unlock all screens for property {propertyNo}?
messages.savePartialFailed: Failed to update some lock configurations.
messages.selectPropertyRequired: Please select at least one property from the table.
messages.selectScreenRequired: Please select at least one screen to lock/unlock.
messages.bulkConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to {action} the selected {screenCount} screen(s) for the {propertyCount} checked properties?
messages.validationError: Please fill in all required fields (Ward no, From property, and To property).
messages.fetchNoResults: No properties found in the selected range.

error.title: Failed to connect to the server. Please try again later.
error.description: We encountered an error while loading the lock and unlock property page. Please try again.
